values.content:
You are a grant relevance filter. You receive a search query, optional filters, and a list of grants. Your job is to decide which grants are genuinely
  relevant to the user's search.

  FILTERING RULES:
  1. Analyze the search query to understand the specific domain, topic, and intent.

  2. Keep a grant ONLY if its Title or Description directly relates to the query's core topic. The grant's primary purpose must clearly serve the searched
  domain.
 
  3. Discard a grant if the connection to the search query requires more than one logical hop or is only tangential.

  4. When in doubt, DISCARD. Users prefer fewer, highly relevant results over many loosely related ones.	

  ADDITIONAL FILTERS (apply only if the value is provided and not "Any" or empty):
  - Organization Type: Only keep grants whose eligible applicants include this org type.
  - Nonprofit/For-Profit Status: If "Nonprofit", discard grants only for for-profits. If "For-Profit", discard grants only for nonprofits. If "Either" or
  empty, skip.
  - Industry/Sector: Only keep grants relevant to this sector. Use semantic matching.
  - Funding Category: "Federal Grant" = only federal. "Foundation / Private Grant" = only philanthropic/foundation. If empty, skip.
- Geographic Focus: If provided, only keep grants whose eligibility includes this geographic area (state, region, or "Nationwide"). Discard grants
  restricted to other states/countries.

   Return ONLY a valid JSON object with two properties:
  - "ids": array of IDs of grants that pass ALL filters
  - "no_results": boolean, true if no grants matched

  Example with matches: {"ids": ["361204", "358858", "352411"], "no_results": false}
  Example with no matches: {"ids": [], "no_results": true}

  Do NOT return markdown or explanation. Just the JSON object.

parameters.jsCode:
// Add additional major philanthropic foundations
const foundations = [
  {
    name: 'Bezos Earth Fund',
    ein: 'BEZOS',
    focus: 'Climate change, nature conservation, environmental justice',
    link: 'https://www.bezosearthfund.org/',
    floor: 100000,
    ceiling: 10000000
  },
  {
    name: 'Chan Zuckerberg Initiative',
    ein: 'CZI',
    focus: 'Science, education, community',
    link: 'https://chanzuckerberg.com/',
    floor: 50000,
    ceiling: 5000000
  },
  {
    name: 'The Ballmer Group',
    ein: 'BALLMER',
    focus: 'Economic mobility for children and families',
    link: 'https://www.ballmergroup.org/',
    floor: 25000,
    ceiling: 2000000
  },
  {
    name: 'Arnold Ventures',
    ein: 'ARNOLD',
    focus: 'Criminal justice, education, health, public finance',
    link: 'https://www.arnoldventures.org/',
    floor: 50000,
    ceiling: 3000000
  },
  {
    name: 'The Kresge Foundation',
    ein: '38-1359217',
    focus: 'Expanding opportunity in American cities',
    link: 'https://kresge.org/',
    floor: 25000,
    ceiling: 1000000
  },
  {
    name: 'The Annie E. Casey Foundation',
    ein: '52-0841143',
    focus: 'Child welfare, juvenile justice, economic opportunity',
    link: 'https://www.aecf.org/',
    floor: 25000,
    ceiling: 500000
  },
  {
    name: 'The California Endowment',
    ein: '95-4523232',
    focus: 'Health equity, healthy communities',
    link: 'https://www.calendow.org/',
    floor: 25000,
    ceiling: 1000000
  },
  {
    name: 'The JPB Foundation',
    ein: '27-6991959',
    focus: 'Poverty, environment, medical research',
    link: 'https://www.jpbfoundation.org/',
    floor: 50000,
    ceiling: 2000000
  },
  {
    name: 'The Heinz Endowments',
    ein: '25-1215856',
    focus: 'Creativity, environment, learning - PITTSBURGH/PA FOCUSED',
    link: 'https://www.heinz.org/',
    floor: 10000,
    ceiling: 500000
  },
  {
    name: 'William Penn Foundation',
    ein: '23-1503488',
    focus: 'Creative communities, watershed, great learning - PHILADELPHIA FOCUSED',
    link: 'https://williampennfoundation.org/',
    floor: 10000,
    ceiling: 1000000
  },
  {
    name: 'The Philadelphia Foundation',
    ein: '23-1365390',
    focus: 'Arts, education, human services - GREATER PHILADELPHIA',
    link: 'https://www.philafound.org/',
    floor: 5000,
    ceiling: 100000
  },
  {
    name: 'The Pittsburgh Foundation',
    ein: '25-0965466',
    focus: 'Community development, education, human services - PITTSBURGH REGION',
    link: 'https://pittsburghfoundation.org/',
    floor: 5000,
    ceiling: 100000
  }
];

const grants = foundations.map((f, i) => ({
  json: {
    id: f.ein + '-' + Date.now(),
    oppNum: f.ein.replace(/-/g, ''),
    title: f.name + ' - Philanthropic Foundation',
    description: 'Focus areas: ' + f.focus + '. Research their current RFPs and funding priorities.',
    link: f.link,
    openDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
    closeDate: 'Ongoing - Check website',
    agency: f.name,
    agencyCode: f.ein,
    category: 'Major Foundation',
    source: 'Major Philanthropies',
    awardFloor: f.floor,
    awardCeiling: f.ceiling,
    status: 'active'
  }
}));

return grants;

nodes.name: search for proposal with query
nodes.notes: POST: { grantId, rfpText, funderName, funderFocus, deadline, planeIssueId }
